exercises.title: Conversational Flow
exercises.instruction: Shadow natural conversation with pauses and emphasis.
exercises.targetText: You know, I was thinking about our project, and I have some ideas.
tips: 'You know' is a conversation filler, keep it light

exercises.title: Expressing Uncertainty
exercises.instruction: Use rising intonation to show uncertainty.
exercises.targetText: I'm not sure if that's the right approach.
tips: Voice rises slightly on uncertain statements: ↗
Keep the tone tentative, not confident

exercises.title: Storytelling Pace
exercises.instruction: Shadow with storytelling pace and emotion.
exercises.targetText: We tried everything, but nothing worked until we finally found the solution.
tips: Use dramatic pauses: 'but nothing worked... until'
Stress: tried, everything, nothing, worked, finally, found, solution

exercises.title: Thoughtful Pauses
exercises.targetText: Well, let me think... I believe we should go ahead.
tips: 'Well' is a hesitation marker, keep it short
Use ellipses to show thinking pause

exercises.title: Expressing Opinion
exercises.instruction: Shadow expressing an opinion with conviction.
exercises.targetText: In my opinion, this is the best option available.
